---
title: "Sources"
bibliography: "../bachelor-thesis-report/bibliography.bib"
---

## fMRIPrep Related
- fMRIPrep [website](https://fmriprep.org/en/stable/){target="_blank"}
- fMRIPrep [source code](https://github.com/nipreps/fmriprep){target="_blank"}
- fMRIPrep Andy’s Brain Book [fMIRIPrep tutorial](https://andysbrainbook.readthedocs.io/en/latest/OpenScience/OS/fMRIPrep_Demo.html){target="_blank"}
- FreeSurfer [website](https://surfer.nmr.mgh.harvard.edu/){target="_blank"}

---

## Datasets

- [Flanker task (event-related)](https://openneuro.org/datasets/ds000102/versions/00001){target="_blank"} from [OpenNeuro](https://openneuro.org/){target="_blank"} used for fuzzy fMRIPrep testing

---

## Scientific Papers

- @Alizadeh2025.12.22.695524
- @Chatelain2026.01.09.698203
- @denis2018verificarlocheckingfloatingpoint
- @KOIKE2021102600

---

## Software

- @semester-project
- @fuzzy-fmriprep
- @fuzzy
- @verificarlo

---

## Youtube videos

- @FMRI1
- @FMRI2
- @FMRI3
- @fuzzy-video

---

## LLMS
The following LLMs were used for concept explanations and trouble-shooting.
They didn't write any code unless specified directly inside the according file.

- Qwen 3.6-Plus
- OpenCode's Big Pickle

---

## Other

  - [Marimo website](https://marimo.io/){target="_blank"}
  - [Quarto website](https://quarto.org/){target="_blank"}
  - [Graphviz website](https://graphviz.org/){target="_blank"}
  - [Excalidraw website](https://excalidraw.com/){target="_blank"}
  - [Slurm website](https://www.schedmd.com/){target="_blank}
  - [Numpy documentation](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/index.html){target="_blank"}
  - [Nushell website](https://www.nushell.sh/){target="_blank"}

---

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
